scripts.dev: npm run dev:sokosumi & npm run dev:masumi & npm run dev:kodosumi
scripts.build: npm -w @summation/sokosumi run build && npm -w @summation/masumi run build && npm -w @summation/kodosumi run build
scripts.lint: npm -w @summation/sokosumi run lint && npm -w @summation/masumi run lint && npm -w @summation/kodosumi run lint
